review_title: Great SEO UI with tons of data and updates!
description: I really love the UI and it looks great. It is quite easy to find your way around. With the speed of updates Ranks Pro should be a great player in the industry quite soon. Really loving the tool and it makes it easy to get information to my clients.
author: Josh C.
pros: Ranks pro really has a fantastic UI that is pretty and easy to navigate and they are updating the tool while still being affordable. It just works well and really looks nice and has some great graphs.
cons: At this point the map ranking tracker does not have the ability to add certain points on a map like Local falcon or something like that. There are times that loading data or pages seem a little slow but not deal breaker.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All in all, signing up for RanksPro is a no-brainer.
description: All in all, signing up for RanksPro is a no-brainer. The functionality compared to that of SEMrush is, of course limited, but I'm not sure RanksPro even wants to compete with the Big 3 in SEO by offering a vast palette of functions that you hardly ever use. RanksPro seems to have taken the approach of "less is more"meaning that with RanksPro you get what you need to do absolutely perfect SEO. No more, no less. I give RanksPro 4 stars instead of 5 because their AI-writer is still under development and doesn't yet function in the way that one would wish. E.g. it lacks the ability to write articles with headers (H1, H2, etc.). I do know that they are developing a collection of different AI-writing tools, so I expect this part to be a really neat solution once it's up and running. One cool thing to note about the AI functions is that when you do keyword research you have the option to create titles to write articles upon directly in the search result, which is an amazing feature. On top of this it not only the search volume, KW difficulty, and so forth - but it also provides a comprehensive list of both keyword variations and Question based keywords. This is a killer feature for hitting the nail spot-on when writing the content for the given keyword. Compared to other tools RanksPro brings new features and updates on a regular basis. Their last update made filtering on par with the big tools. This was indeed a cool update. No matter if you are a pro or a newbie with a single site I recommend getting RanksPro.
author: Christian F.
pros: Extremely intuitive user interface. Full suite with: Rank Tracking, Site Audit, Keyword Research, Competitive Research, Backlink analysis, and AI writer. Friendly customer support.
cons: To access Google data, you must click "Access Google Data" whenever you want to view it. When you make a Site Audit it doesn't save the audit, so you have to redo it, instead of updating it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Be careful : Doesn't work anymore
description: Rankspro has not been working since early July 2025. I tried to contact support by every means possible: no response. In August, I requested a refund: support's response was to delete my account without explanation, while remaining unreachable. Since then, I have been using SpySERP, which is much better.
author: Hugo D.
pros: - Nothing : it doesn't work anymore. It's useless. It used to work in the past, but not anymore, and the team hasn't said anything about it.
cons: - Maybe the fact that they sell a tool to do 1 thing, and it doesn't work anymore. What could I say more ?
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Professional SEO tool
description: I've been utilizing RanksPro for a few weeks now, and I'm quite pleased! The setup process was straightforward, allowing me to begin monitoring my keywords immediately. The interface is user-friendly. I particularly appreciate the precise rank tracking and comprehensive backlink analysis, which have enhanced my SEO tactics. The customer support is excellent—responsive and supportive whenever I have inquiries. With a 60-day money-back guarantee, RanksPro is certainly worth considering for anyone aiming to improve their SEO outcomes!
author: Andrew J.
pros: It has a great keyword tracking feature, backlink analysis, and keyword search feature
cons: Keyword research could return a larger number of results
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: invaluable asset to our SEO operations
description: The platform's affordability, combined with its robust features, offers exceptional value. Notably, the responsive customer support team promptly addresses any inquiries, enhancing the overall experience.
author: Timothy H.
pros: Its user-friendly interface simplifies complex tasks like keyword tracking, competitor analysis, and site audits.
cons: The loading time per project to update and complete.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A new competitor in the market for SEO tools
description: Tool has been very good but support can be still made better and there is still room for improvement
author: Bharatwaj R.
pros: We found it the best to identify the rankings of the client and show case them in a detailed way and also competitors analyzing is the best.
cons: Whitelabel doesnt allow us to put our domain name or sub domain in guest backlinks
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Paid and Got Nothing — Avoid This Service
description: Feels like a scam. I paid for a service and received absolutely nothing — no login, no product, and no reply. Totally unprofessional and unacceptable. I feel robbed.
author: yves I.
pros: Absolutely everything. They charged my card and delivered nothing — no product, no login, no support. It’s beyond disappointing — it’s fraudulent.
cons: RanksPro.io was a complete disaster. I trusted them based on the marketing and positive reviews, but after paying, I received nothing and was completely ignored. This is the first time I’ve encountered something that feels like a scam in the SEO space. I do not recommend it to anyone. Be very careful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, Accurate, and Effective SEO Tool
description: Overall, RanksPro has been reliable and efficient for my SEO workflows. It covers the essentials well, saves me time, and helps me stay focused on what’s actually working. Great value for the price, and I’ve had a positive experience so far.
author: Eric Q.
pros: RanksPro.io gives you exactly what you need without the clutter. Rank tracking is fast and accurate, the UI is clean, and it’s easy to manage multiple projects. Customer support is quick to respond, which matters when you're working under deadlines.
cons: A few features still feel early-stage, like backlink data and audit tools. I'd also like to see better integration with platforms like Google Analytics and Search Console. Nothing critical, just areas that could be stronger.
author_profession: Independent Web Architect and IT Specialist
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best SEO tool for all levels.
description: Really happy with my purchase of RanksPro. The help and support from the team is also very responsive which makes all the difference.
author: Fiona M.
pros: Love the easy to use interface, the keyword tracking and competitor research. Everything about RanksPro is super useful and has made such a difference in updating and optimising SEO. I use it for client sites and it's fantastic. it's also super easy to produce reports. Perfect for beginners or experts.
cons: Nothing - I haven't had any issues and am consistently finding new ways to use the program.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: i'll use best my seo tools

The feature I would like to have is that it automatically takes new search words from the search console. It would also remove words that fall below the ranking I specify.

review_title: Great SEO application

cons: For now what needs to be improved are the reports, the link with Google Search Console and having translations into other languages ​​such as Spanish.

review_title: Great Promising Tool!
description: My experience has been great. I'm looking forward to the many features that are going to be released this year.

pros: I invested in the tool mainly for keyword tracking and technical seo audits. So far it's exceeding my expectations. Probably one of the best seo tools I got last year.

review_title: Nice SEO Tool
author: Brian F.
pros: What I like most is how fast and reliable the rank tracking is. The regular updates are accurate, and the interface is clean and easy to navigate. I also appreciate how quickly I can compare keyword performance across multiple domains without needing to run separate reports.
cons: I wish there were more third-party integrations, especially with tools like Google Search Console or reporting platforms. The export options work, but having automated report scheduling or deeper customization would make client reporting even smoother.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excelente herramienta a un precio accesible.
description: Vengo manejando varios proyectos con Rankspro. La evolución constante y la incorporación de nuevas funciones hacen de rankspro una herramienta cada día mas útil para mi trabajo.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Fácil de usar, intuitivo. Precio/calidad inmejorable.
cons: La calidad del diseño debería mejorar. Asi y todo el diseño UI es claro y fácil de entender. Deberían rediseñar la UI pero manteniendo la facilidad de uso.

review_title: with small improvements it will become my favorite app
description: The app does what it says and I hope it makes some upgrades and becomes my favorite.

pros: It is a complete application that helps me a lot in understanding my website and competitors. It still needs a little work but it is on the right track.
cons: It is a little slow with the website rankings on Google, it does not receive data often and as a result it does not show the correct rankings often enough.

review_title: It is exactly what I was looking for.
description: My overall experience has been great, it is exactly what I was looking for and helps fill in the gaps that some of my other software has.

review_title: Great platform with a lot of potential
description: I've been using it for a week now and I am really liking the platform so far. I will definitely continue to use it and look forward to the future updates.
author: Jordan J.
pros: It's in the beginning stages, but the platform has a lot of potential. Out the gate it offers many features a lot of it's competitors offers, but at a reasonable price. Support has been responsive for me on any issues I submit.
cons: It's missing the reporting features. I would love to be able to export a branded report for clients or embed a dashboard report on our internal support portal. Also, there isn't the ability to white-label the complete platform yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An Amazing & Fast Tool for Rank Tracking
description: It has been quite good. Not just me, but my team is also using this for keeping up with our SEO campaigns so that we don't miss out on core things.

pros: The first and foremost thing that I liked about this tool is that it is blazing fast. Delivers data in an instant. Another likable aspect is the interface, simple and sleek. No complex navigation and not much time to get started. And yes, the ranking data is accurate, which is what anyone would want from such a tool.
cons: Nothing as yet. But yeah, waiting to see more features embedded in the tool soon.
